name: dotfiles-build-optimizer
description: Repo-local CI build optimizer for the dotfiles Docker, devcontainer, and GitHub Actions workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local CI triage and remediation workflows
interface.longDescription: Monitor failed GitHub Actions runs, normalize failure reports, launch multi-agent research, run local preflight checks, and drive branch-based remediation loops for this repo.
defaultPrompt: Use $gha-monitor-loop to triage the latest failed CI run for this repo.
Use $gha-run-triage on a failed Actions run URL from this repository.
Use $local-preflight to validate likely CI failures before pushing.
